completed_tasks.name: Load prior context (ROADMAP, REQUIREMENTS, STATE, Phase 1/2 CONTEXT)
Scout codebase (lifespan, db package, market package, tests)
Identify and present 4 gray areas to user
Deep-dive all 4 gray areas (14 sub-questions, all Recommended selected)

remaining_tasks.name: Update .planning/STATE.md to reflect Phase 3 context gathered

decisions.rationale: Mirrors Phase 1/2 pattern; public surface via __init__.py

decisions.decision: D-02: Pure functions taking (conn, cache, ...) for the trade service
decisions.rationale: Framework-agnostic so Phase 5 chat auto-exec can import and call directly

decisions.decision: D-03: Pydantic v2 BaseModel for request and response models
D-04: Tick-observer callback (register_tick_observer) added to MarketDataSource ABC + both impls
decisions.rationale: PLAN.md forbids a separate background task; observer piggybacks on existing tick loop without breaking module boundary

decisions.decision: D-05: Observer registered in lifespan after source.start(tickers)
decisions.rationale: Keeps module boundary — portfolio code owns the snapshot, market code owns the tick

decisions.decision: D-06: app.state.last_snapshot_at float tracks 60s snapshot clock
decisions.rationale: Consistent with Phase 1 D-02 (no module-level singletons)

decisions.decision: D-07: Trade snapshot resets the 60s clock
decisions.rationale: Avoids back-to-back near-duplicate snapshots around trade times

decisions.decision: D-09: Domain exceptions (InsufficientCash / InsufficientShares / UnknownTicker / PriceUnavailable) subclass TradeValidationError
decisions.rationale: Service stays FastAPI-agnostic; Phase 5 chat catches and formats into chat reply

decisions.decision: D-10/D-11: 400 Bad Request with {detail: {error: <code>, message: <human>}}; 422 reserved for pydantic
decisions.rationale: Machine-readable code + human message; clean separation of business-rule vs schema failure

decisions.decision: D-13: Reject trade with 400 price_unavailable when cache.get_price returns None
decisions.rationale: No silent fallback to seed prices; client retries if race window hits

decisions.decision: D-14: Reject trade with 400 unknown_ticker when ticker not in watchlist table
decisions.rationale: Watchlist set = cache set (PLAN.md §6); clean Phase 3 / Phase 4 boundary

decisions.decision: D-15: DELETE positions row when sell zeros out quantity (epsilon abs(new_qty) < 1e-9)
decisions.rationale: Idiomatic 'current holdings'; re-buy gets fresh avg_cost; epsilon handles float residuals

decisions.decision: D-16: Weighted avg_cost on BUY adding to existing position

uncommitted_files.notes: Partial edits present — status flipped to 'planning', percent changed from 20 to 100. Needs review; pause-work does not own STATE.md updates.
Appended GSD stack/convention blocks; unrelated to phase-3 discuss-phase work.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 3 — 03-CONTEXT.md is ready for the planner to consume.
context_notes: Phase 3 (Portfolio & Trading API) discuss-phase completed cleanly. 14 gray-area questions answered, all Recommended options selected. Key architectural note: introduces tick-observer callback (register_tick_observer) onto the already-Validated MarketDataSource ABC — the planner and executor must extend the ABC and both implementations (SimulatorDataSource, MassiveDataSource) as a scoped change, with observer failures isolated via try/except + logger.exception so a bad callback can't kill the tick loop. Phase 5 (chat) will reuse the pure-function trade service directly by catching domain exceptions (InsufficientCash, InsufficientShares, UnknownTicker, PriceUnavailable) — that is why the service must not raise HTTPException.
